# meok-law-mcp

> MEOK LAW MCP — region-aware AI governance on the real CSOAI crosswalks. Tools: applicable rules by region/entity, cross-border crosswalk handoff, AI social contract, register + track agents. Built by MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- law_overview
- law_applicable
- law_crosswalk
- law_social_contract
- law_register

## Install
```
pip install meok-law-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-law-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
